conflict_name: Major China battle episodes (Second Sino-Japanese War and Chinese Civil War)
aliases: Chinese Civil War major campaign episodes
family_summary: Episode-split research family spanning major China-centered battle episodes from Shanghai and Nanjing in 1937 through Huaihai in 1948-1949, with DR estimation attempted only where subnational numerator and denominator integrity can be defended.
notes: Family intentionally mixes two wars for research triage purposes only. Sino-Japanese episodes and Chinese Civil War episodes are kept analytically separate, and no whole-country denominators are used for subnational episodes.
